features.name: countbits with x control bit
features.description: Code should include a $countbits system function call with 1'bx as a control bit argument to count bits matching the x value

features.name: countbits with z control bit
features.description: Code should include a $countbits system function call with 1'bz as a control bit argument to count bits matching the z value

features.name: countbits with multiple control bits including x or z
features.description: Code should include a $countbits system function call with multiple control bits where at least one is x or z, following IEEE 1800-2023 semantics
